charpicker.no_target: Click into a text field first.

statusbar.gigotquick.title: Gigot — open Collaboration
statusbar.reload.title: Reload current workspace data
codeeditor.format_title: Tidy whitespace, normalize line endings, ensure trailing newline (Shift+Alt+F)
codeeditor.placeholder: Type your template here. Ctrl+Enter to toggle full-screen.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.connect.in: Configure the active GiGot server and store the subscription bearer in the OS keychain. The token is never written to the profile JSON — it lives in the keychain under '<profile>:gigot:<repository>' so future sync ops resolve it without re-prompting.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.connect.to: The bearer issued when you subscribed to this GiGot server. Saved to the OS keychain when 'Save bearer for sync' is on.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.connect.sa: Stores the bearer in the OS keychain. Turn off to verify the connection without persisting the secret.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.connect.un: Server responded but health check failed.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.info: Fetch the configured GiGot repository into the active context folder. Clone is a merge-aware pull (server deletes apply locally, local-only files survive). Re-clone first wipes managed paths (templates/, storage/, README.md, .gitignore, the sync ledger) and then fetches a fresh copy — use it when you want to discard local edits and re-key to the server's HEAD.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.not_: Configure Context Directory, GiGot Base URL, and Repository on Current Service before cloning.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.recl: Every gigot-managed path under {0} (templates/, storage/, README.md, .gitignore, .formidable/sync.json) will be deleted and re-fetched from the server. Local-only edits in managed paths will be LOST. Other files in the context folder are preserved.
workspace.collaboration.graph.info: Recent commits on the active branch.
workspace.collaboration.sync.info: Review the working tree, commit local changes, and push them to the remote.
workspace.collaboration.commit.title: Commit changes
workspace.collaboration.commit.message_p: e.g. Update README and fix typos
workspace.collaboration.author_dialog.bo: Commits stamp the author into history. Enter the name and email you want to appear on the remote — these stay in your profile and only need to be set once.
workspace.collaboration.author_dialog.na: Enter your name ("unknown" is the seeded default).
workspace.collaboration.open_remote.no_o: No 'origin' remote configured for this repository.
workspace.collaboration.forget_token.con: Remove the stored Git token for {0} from the OS keychain? You'll be prompted to paste it again on the next push or fetch that needs auth.
workspace.collaboration.clone.info: Clone an existing Git repository. The PAT is discarded after cloning unless 'Save token for sync' is on — in which case it's stored in the OS keychain so future pulls and pushes don't re-prompt.
workspace.collaboration.clone.pat_help: Optional. Required for private HTTPS clones; left blank for public repos.
workspace.collaboration.clone.save_token: Stores the token in the OS keychain (Keychain / Credential Manager / Secret Service) so future pulls and pushes don't re-prompt.
Could not save token to keychain: {0}
workspace.collaboration.status.title: Repository status
workspace.collaboration.status.divergenc: Local commits ahead / remote commits behind. Run Fetch to refresh the remote-tracking ref.
workspace.collaboration.pull.disabled_de: Detached HEAD — check out a branch first.
workspace.collaboration.pull.dirty_messa: Your worktree has uncommitted changes. Stash them, pull from the remote, then put your changes back.
workspace.collaboration.pull.override_me: The pull won out for these paths: {0}. Reach out to the listed authors if you need to coordinate.
workspace.collaboration.pull.divergent_m: Your local branch and the remote both have new commits. Automatic merge isn't supported yet — resolve via a git CLI (or push if your local commits should win), then try again.
workspace.collaboration.push.disabled_de: Detached HEAD — check out a branch first.
workspace.collaboration.push.disabled_up: Nothing to push — local matches remote.
workspace.collaboration.status.discard_c: Throw away local changes to {0}? This cannot be undone.
workspace.collaboration.status.not_a_rep: Path is not a git repository.
workspace.collaboration.no_backend:
No remote backend configured.
Pick Git or GiGot in Settings → Locations.
workspace.collaboration.git.info: Git-backed sharing of templates, storage, and plugins via your own remote.
workspace.collaboration.git.placeholder: Git collaboration view will land in a later iteration.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.info: GiGot service integration for team-shared Formidable workspaces.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.placeholde: GiGot collaboration view will land in a later iteration.
workspace.information.about.aaron_quote: "We are all made of stardust, and we are all made of stories." — Aaron Swartz
workspace.information.about.aaron_text: And to {name} — who refused to back down when it mattered.
workspace.information.about.author: by {0}
workspace.information.about.elly_quote: "Sleep, don't weep — My sweet love" — from album "9" by Damien Rice
workspace.information.about.elly_text: Dedicated to {name} — who lived with strength, humor and clarity.
workspace.information.about.tagline: A System for Templates and Markdown Forms
workspace.information.monitoring.info: Live observation surface over the journal, log and request streams. Tiles below render against the registered sources.
workspace.information.monitoring.placeho: Monitoring view will land in a later iteration.
workspace.information.shortcuts.intro: Global shortcuts available while the matching workspace is active. {0} is the primary modifier on this system.
workspace.information.logging.info: System log stream. Live tail shows entries broadcast in-process; the raw file is the on-disk formidable.log truncated each app start.
workspace.information.logging.empty_file: Log file is empty (or file logging is off).
workspace.information.journal_feed.info: Chronological view of every mutation and sync recorded in this context's .changes.log.
workspace.information.server.config_hint: The startup auto-start flag and listening port live in Settings → Internal Server.
workspace.information.server.info: Runtime control of the wiki HTTP server. Toggle on to serve forms over loopback; both the system browser and the in-app webview can open them.
workspace.information.subtitle: Wails 3 rewrite of Formidable.
workspace.information.title: Information
workspace.plugins.commands.empty: No commands defined yet — add one to make this plugin runnable.
workspace.plugins.commands.form_button_t: Render this command as a button inside the plugin's form
workspace.plugins.commands.label: Label
workspace.plugins.commands.log_as_toast_: Surface every formidable.log.* line as a live toast
workspace.plugins.commands.show_log_titl: Show the log panel after running
workspace.plugins.commands.show_output_t: Show the result panel after running

workspace.plugins.create.exists: A plugin with that id already exists.
workspace.plugins.create.help: Lowercase letters, digits, dash, underscore. The folder, manifest, and main.lua are created with sensible defaults.
workspace.plugins.create.invalid: Invalid id — only lowercase letters, digits, dash, and underscore.
workspace.plugins.create.label: Plugin folder name
workspace.plugins.create.title: New plugin
workspace.plugins.delete.confirm: Delete plugin '{0}'? Its folder and stored data will be removed.
workspace.plugins.delete.title: Delete plugin
workspace.plugins.empty_main:
Select a plugin from the sidebar,
or create a new one via Plugin → Create.
workspace.plugins.empty_side: No plugins installed. Drop a plugin folder under {0} and click Refresh, or create one via Plugin → Create.
workspace.plugins.error_server_not_runni: Plugin requires the internal server, but it's stopped. Start it from the Information workspace and try again.
workspace.plugins.manifest.author: Author
workspace.plugins.manifest.debug_help: When on, the run dialog shows a collapsible debug panel with each command's output and logs.
workspace.plugins.manifest.name: Name
workspace.plugins.manifest.requires_inte: When on, formidable.api.fetch is unlocked in Lua and the run is blocked unless the wiki HTTP server is running.
workspace.plugins.manifest.run_mode_help: Modal: each command appears as a card; ctx is empty. Form: the plugin's form is the entry point and every command receives its values as ctx.
workspace.plugins.manifest.title: Manifest
workspace.plugins.debug.title: Debug
workspace.plugins.form.empty: No input fields yet — add one to give the user something to fill in before running.
workspace.plugins.form.placeholder: Visual form builder is coming next — for now this tab is a placeholder.
workspace.plugins.source.help: main.lua — global functions are exposed as command targets. Ctrl+Enter toggles fullscreen.
